assertions.reason: The briefing API response contained no duplicate article URLs.
The health API exposes per-feed status, timestamps, and article counts across the RSS feed catalog.
evidence: Feeds with status=213, with lastCheckedAt=212, with articleCount=213
Status distribution: ok=91, empty=91, failed=30, never-checked=1

frictions: After backend startup, GET /api/health continued to report refreshInProgress=true and status="stale" while serving the last successful snapshot; validation used that snapshot for these read-only assertions.
